
```{r fig-graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of svd decomposition of doc-term matrix, weighted by ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of svd decomposition of doc-term matrix, weighted by ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of svd decomposition of doc-term matrix, weighted by ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of svd decomposition of doc-term matrix, weighted by ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of svd decomposition of doc-term matrix, weighted by ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_svd_e0c6e4de_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of glmnet 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of glmnet 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of glmnet 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of glmnet 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of glmnet 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_94bb9289_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of LiblineaR 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of LiblineaR 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of LiblineaR 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of LiblineaR 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of LiblineaR 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_01c6ac6c_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of naivebayes 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of naivebayes 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of naivebayes 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of naivebayes 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of naivebayes 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_d0247f65_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of xgboost 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_jj_JJ_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of xgboost 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_nn_NN_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of xgboost 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_vb_VB_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of xgboost 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE}
#| fig-cap: Weights of xgboost 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_weight_pred_predictive_model_68f4b16b_workset_meta_workset_feature_democracy_corpus_hathi_all_period_decade_1700_2010_10_corpus_hathi_all_ism_TRUE)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_ff59c994}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature feature_ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_ff59c994)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_dfab65d6}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature feature_ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_dfab65d6)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_973769ff}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature feature_ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_973769ff)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_fe0520e7}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature feature_ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_fe0520e7)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_8d26a8e4}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature feature_ppmi 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_8d26a8e4)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_f6a2aa93}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature ppmi_similarities 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_f6a2aa93)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_35f890d8}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature ppmi_similarities 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_35f890d8)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_88b7cb0f}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature ppmi_similarities 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_88b7cb0f)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_53a23a19}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature ppmi_similarities 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_53a23a19)

graph

```



```{r fig-graph_9946a17b}
#| fig-cap: PPMI with target feature ppmi_similarities 500 vols. sample lowercased. Terms at the top are more closely associated with 'democracy' in later years. Label indicates the peak density of association.
#| fig-height: 9
graph <- tar_read(graph_9946a17b)

graph

```
